note: Positive gap means Marin is worse. Negative gap means Marin is better. The dashboard hides the superseded chat-framed synthetic_numeric_format_ppl stress slices; use synthetic_numeric_format_prompt_ablation_ppl for the base-model numeric-format comparison. Includes fixed long_context_32k 32B gap results from issue #5825, with QASPER rendered as Text/Question/Answer and BookSum rendered as Chapter/Summary target-only; LIMA train is included as a ChatML-style target-only instruction-following slice. Prompt-format sensitivity v2 fixes JSON/JSONL heldout continuations and uses field-list targets for record extraction. Code-interpretation (#6070) adds Python REPL/doctest/arrow-control probes for expression evaluation and small function/class calls.
